Scenario: Submitting a form with required fields left empty in Bugasura.
Sub Feature Name: Add or link test cases from the repository or create new ones
Test Conditions: This involves trying to submit a form without filling out mandatory fields.
Test Idea: Examining Bugasura's response when not all required fields are filled.
Test Steps:
Step 1: Open the web browser. 
Step 2: Navigate to 'https://www.flipkart.com'. 
Step 3: Add an item to the cart and proceed to checkout. 
Step 4: Select 'PayPal' as the payment method. 
Step 5: Complete the payment through PayPal. 
Step 6: Verify that the transaction is processed without errors. 
Step 7: Repeat the above steps for other supported gateways (e.g., Stripe). 
Step 8: Ensure all transactions are processed correctly through each gateway.

Scenario: Observing the behavior when attempting to upload files in unsupported formats to Bugasura.
Sub Feature Name: Add or link test cases from the repository or create new ones
Test Idea: Exploring how Bugasura responds to unsupported file uploads.
Acceptance Criteria: The system should display an error message indicating the file format is unsupported.
